description: Golden queries for 0x1audio ML ranking. Reindex after recipe changes, then score Precision@k / Recall@k / MRR.

queries.notes: Soft semantic recall; tag overlap may boost but must not gate. Prefer frozen MuQ-era relevant_ids_file for before/after comparability.
Should stay empty / weak when catalog has no opera-like tracks. Watch CLAP false positives.
